title: Resources pack glowing ores vanilla
description:
Glowing ores vanilla! 1.20-1.21+ by H_Quy_mc
No mod
No shader 
No optifine
body:
____
# conversation
____
A: Hey, have you tried the resource pack called Glow Ore Vanilla?

B: No, what does it do?

A: It makes ores glow with a bright outline. You can see coal, iron,
even diamonds in caves more easily.

B: Sounds useful. Does it need mods or OptiFine?

A: Not at all. It works in vanilla Minecraft. Just drop it into the 
resourcepacks folder and enable it.

B: Nice. So it doesn’t change the whole game, only the ore textures?

A: Exactly. It keeps the vanilla look, but the ores are highlighted.
Perfect if you don’t want shaders.

B: That’s great, because my laptop lags with shaders.

A: Same here. This pack is light, no FPS drop.

B: What versions does it work on?

A: I tested on 1.20, and it’s fine. People said it also runs on 1.18 
and 1.19 with the right pack_format.

B: Cool. If I use another pack that changes ores, will it still work?

A: Yes, just put Glow Ore Vanilla on top of the list.

B: Got it. Thanks, I’ll try it tonight.

A: No problem. Enjoy glowing diamonds!
____
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d473b452dbb15b24142dde1b1870051e9015d34c_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/PfknxDj2y)
